name: Calculadora del Teorema de Pitágoras
desc: Calcula la hipotenusa de un triángulo rectángulo dados los dos catetos.
description: Calcula la hipotenusa de un triángulo rectángulo dados los dos catetos.
seo_description: Calcula la hipotenusa con el teorema de Pitágoras. Introduce los catetos a y b y obtén c, área y perímetro. Herramienta gratuita con formula y ejemplos.
example_label: Find the hypotenuse of a right triangle with legs 5.5m and 12.3m for roof rafter calculation

range_hints.cateto_a: Construction: 0.5-50m; Surveying: 1-1000m; General: any positive value
range_hints.cateto_b: Same as cateto_a; both must be positive non-zero values

result_context: The hipotenusa ({hipotenusa}) is the longest side opposite the right angle; area_triangulo ({area_triangulo}) is half the product of legs; perimetro ({perimetro}) is total boundary length.
formula_display: Hypotenuse = √(Cateto A² + Cateto B²) | Área = (A × B) ÷ 2
mistakes: Adding legs directly instead of squaring first (5.5 + 12.3 ≠ hypotenuse)
Forgetting to take square root after adding the squares
Using this fórmula for non-right triangles where it doesn't apply
